author: @fransmurati2370
text: Organised chaos, I luv it!!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: LOL! Everything has its place hahaha! :)

author: @tahirqureshitgq7892
text: Excellent, thanks.

author: @antoniosanford4675
text: Your workshop is cool!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Thank you mate! I do love it, whenever I need tools for a problem I just bring it to the workshop. so much easier LOL. :)

author: @Twistedmetal-qe8kx
text: Hey Luke great video, nice to see all the work areas, lots of great workspaces. Just wondering what those cool looking wire racks are for on the windows of the workshop downstairs?

author: @lamarrharding4776
text: What does FWG stand for, what is the product,  what do you send, other than ideas.   I used to work in a lab that produced WAG'S and SWAG's!  SWAG'S are scientific wild ass guesses, different from WAG'S by having numerical values.

replies.author: @Chriswil2011
replies.text: It means forward working generation and first working generation. Both are registered to Robert on the companies house website

author: @zylascope
text: It was great to have a look around. Thanks.

author: @rickparker8036
text: Great looking facility. How many sq ft?

author: @jpsimon206
text: On the last video, I asked a series of questions trying to understand whether you guys were a community organization, an educational facility or what exactly. I've heard you guys talk about members, I feel like I have missed some vital information. Now in this tour video, you referenced an area where you package up and send out orders. So, are you guys a business? What is your product? I want to clarify that while I don't know what's going on, I have really enjoyed the videos and have extracted a lot of value from them. I just don't get... Well, what exactly you guys are?

replies.author: @jpsimon206
replies.text: Okay, now you have mentioned a twitch stream. My understanding is that twitch is a platform of sorts for people to watch other people playing video games? I won't even get into how puzzling that is for me, but can you help an old Luddite understand?

author: @rayg436
text: so much work space, got to love it.

author: @p0ln
text:
One of the things I've learned in various professions,
when you walk onsite, pay close attention to how many people (really)smile and say hello.
This is indicative of how happy they are in their job, 
which is testimonial to how that boss treats their workers, and to the entire work atmosphere they operate within...

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Indeed! Everyone around our yard are very friendly for sure, its a nice place to be based! :)

author: @ThomasAndersonbsf
text: can't wait to hear more about adventures in the battery area for sure

author: @bluemamba5317
text: Haha, they fake darkness outside... Almost was fooled, just looked so weird :P

replies.author: @dans381
replies.text: Yes, look at the shadow of the building, it looked more like 1:00-2:00pm

replies.author: @bluemamba5317
replies.text: @dans381 Exactly. Also the sky is blue with visable contrails.

text: 4:10 haha xD

text: I would like to know more about the Twizzy and what kinds of things have you done to it.

author: @denisstump5874
text: Do you think you could put Doctor Who's Tardis in front of the door that would be pretty cool I think I pronounce that right it's been awhile since I seen the movie

author: @steve29836
text: "Look how dark it is" as he casts a massive shadow across car park. Brightness setting maybe? lol

author: @vossierebel
text:
Luke... you gotta tell us how you managed to scoop the job in Rob's magic factory. It will be an interesting tale, I'm sure!😁 
PS - How much coffee do you consume in a day? Yep, you and Rob - and the other bright minds! I bet a small plantation of beans!☕☕☕☕☕☕

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text:
Hahaha funny story! Maybe I could talk about this on stream or a vid? As it would be a whole essay if I wrote it down LOL. 
We drink so much coffee I possibly consume a good few cups a day hahaha, I can't speak for rob though. easily a small plantation of coffee beans LOL!

replies.author: @vossierebel
replies.text: @MyNameIsLukey  It will be a cool story... I don't do Twitch yet... you'll have to give us old timers a tutorial - mostly I prefer restricting my social media to YT - and as little else as possible - I rather prefer the real against the virtual... if you know what I mean!? 😁👍

author: @stevetobias4890
text: I would love to work in an environment like that, lucky bugger

author: @robertpitt8418
text: A PLACE WERE DREAMS OF THE MIND COMES TO LIGHT .  thanks for sharing luke  :  )

author: @fraydnot
text: So, it looks like Rob never leaves and sleeps on the couch. I have asked before about the wire shelving material by the tools on the wall (windows)? Thanks for the tour

replies.author: @zylascope
replies.text: I've always wondered what the wire shelving on the wall was too. I guess it's for drying electrodes for batteries, but I don't know.

author: @hempev
text: When are you doing something with the Twizy?

replies.author: @zylascope
replies.text: Rob said he had trouble getting its battery management system to work. He said he would keep trying.
